title: Plot Metadata
description: Semantic metadata extracted from an experimental spectrum plot image by VLM

plot_title.description: Title of the plot, if visible

x_axis_label.description: Label of the X axis (e.g., Raman shift (cm⁻¹), Wavelength (nm))

y_axis_label.description: Label of the Y axis (e.g., Intensity, Absorbance)

x_tick_min.description: Minimum tick value on the X axis

x_tick_max.description: Maximum tick value on the X axis

y_tick_min.description: Minimum tick value on the Y axis

y_tick_max.description: Maximum tick value on the Y axis

bounding_box.description: Pixel coordinates of the inner plot area (excluding title, legend, axis labels)

x_min.description: Left edge of plot area in pixels

y_min.description: Top edge of plot area in pixels (image coordinates)

x_max.description: Right edge of plot area in pixels

y_max.description: Bottom edge of plot area in pixels

x_reversed.description: True if X values increase from right to left (left edge has larger value than right)

y_reversed.description: True if Y values increase from top to bottom (top edge has larger value than bottom)

y_calibration.description: Y mapping: axis ticks, or per-curve normalized (baseline=0, peak=1) for stacked spectra without y-axis numbers

x_calibration_points.description: Optional array of exact {pixel, value} pairs for X-axis. Overrides x_tick_min/max mapping to bounding_box edges.

y_calibration_points.description: Optional array of exact {pixel, value} pairs for Y-axis. Overrides y_tick_min/max mapping to bounding_box edges.

pixel.description: Y pixel coordinate image space (origin top-left)

spectrum_type.description: Type of measurement: Raman, SERS, XRD, IR, NMR, UV-Vis, SRD, etc.

notes.description: Uncertain values, blurry labels, or layout quirks

image_width.description: Image width in pixels (optional, for resolution hints)

image_height.description: Image height in pixels (optional, for resolution hints)

low_resolution.description: True if image is low resolution; triggers pre-upscale when auto-detecting

curves.description: For multi-curve/stacked plots: per-curve label, color_hint, region

mask_regions.description: Per-curve mask regions (full-image coords) applied only when extracting this curve. Use to exclude other curves' baselines, nearby features, etc.

text_regions.description: Bounding boxes of in-plot text labels (curve names, annotations) in full-image pixel coordinates. Used to mask out text that shares color with the curve before extraction.

mask_regions.description: Additional bounding boxes (full-image pixel coords) to mask out during extraction — axis tick marks, other curves' baselines, legends, or any non-data feature. Same format as text_regions.

cli_hints.description: VLM-provided hints that map 1:1 to extraction pipeline CLI flags. Agent reads these and builds the command mechanically.

curve_is_black.description: True if any data curve is black (same color as axes/frame). Maps to --allow-black --spatial-filter --cluster-centroid.

text_overlaps_curve.description: True if in-plot text shares color with a curve and overlaps it. Maps to --morph-open.

thin_lines.description: True if data curves are thin (1-2 px) or anti-aliased. Maps to --extraction-method edge+color.

smooth.description: True if curves are noisy, jagged, or have many overlapping text labels. Maps to --smooth.

annotations.description: Measurement-specific in-plot labels (NMR integrations, IR functional groups, Raman band names, XRD Miller indices, etc.)
